app_release_notes: v1.2.21 - Fixed an update loop: if Loadscope was installed somewhere the automatic updater can't replace, it used to ask to update, download, fail, and ask again forever. Now it tells you once and points you to loadscope.app to download it yourself, instead of looping.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.21 - Fixed an update loop: if Loadscope was installed somewhere the automatic updater can't replace, it used to ask to update, download, fail, and ask again forever. Now it tells you once and points you to loadscope.app to download it yourself, instead of looping.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.20 - The Targets library can now print and delete. Right-click a target photo to Print it (a page opens in your browser with a Print button) or Delete it; right-click a load's name to delete all of that load's target photos at once. Deleting a photo never changes your scored result - it only removes the picture. Left-click a photo to view it full size; right-click for those options.
